invariant: Avoid blocking urgent documentation-only review flow.
forbidden_moves: Do not silently choose between conflicting valid invariants.

candidate.description: Ask a human to choose between two valid project priorities.

expected_effect: Human decision resolves invariant priority order.

orientation_center.reason: Two valid invariants conflict and require human priority selection.

pattern: Not every conflict is a validator failure.
risk: Automated choice could encode the wrong priority.

threshold_update: Human priority decision required for tie-breaking.

project_invariant_alignment.reason: Two invariants are partially aligned but conflicting.

side_effect_safety.reason: Side effects depend on human priority.

evidence_path.reason: Evidence exists but does not choose priority.

exact_head_confidence.reason: The conflict is attached to the current head.
